name: servicenow
description: IT Service Management - incidents, changes, and service requests

tools.name: List Incidents
tools.description: List ServiceNow incidents with optional filters

tools.name: Get Incident
tools.description: Get details of a specific incident

tools.name: Create Incident
tools.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow

prompts.title: Check ticket status
prompts.prompt: Check the status of my recent ServiceNow incidents and summarize any that need attention.

prompts.title: Create incident
prompts.prompt: Help me create a new incident in ServiceNow with the appropriate priority and category.

prompts.title: Search knowledge base
prompts.prompt: Search the ServiceNow knowledge base for solutions to common issues.
